pattern_name: Questions (Do you...? / Does he...? / How much...?)
when_to_use: To ask yes/no questions about habits, routines, or facts. Also: WH-questions (what, where, when, how).
when_to_use_ar: لطرح أسئلة نعم/لا عن العادات والحقائق. وكذلك أسئلة: ماذا، أين، متى، كيف.

examples.a: Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
Yes, she does. / No, she doesn't.
Yes, they do. / No, they don't.

examples.q: What do you eat for breakfast?

how_much_many.formula: How much/many + noun + do/does + subject + verb?

examples.q: How many brothers do you have?

common_errors.explanation: English yes/no questions NEED 'Do/Does' at the start (unlike Arabic which just uses tone).
WH-questions also need 'do/does' after the question word.

intonation_note.yes_no: Voice goes UP ↗️ at the end: 'Do you LIKE it?' ↗️
intonation_note.wh: Voice goes DOWN ↘️ at the end: 'Where do you LIVE?' ↘️
intonation_note.tip_ar: أسئلة نعم/لا = الصوت يرتفع. أسئلة ماذا/أين = الصوت ينزل.

quick_rule: Start with Do (I/you/we/they) or Does (he/she/it). After do/does = base verb always. No -s!
quick_rule_ar: ابدأ بـ Do (أنا/أنت/نحن/هم) أو Does (هو/هي). بعد do/does = الفعل الأساسي دائماً.
connect_to_speaking: Questions are your #1 conversation tool. Practice: 'Do you live here? Where do you work? What do you like to eat?' — you can keep any conversation going with questions.
